name: NAPCO SECURITY TECHNOLOGIES, INC
summary: NAPCO Security Technologies designs and manufactures high-tech electronic security devices including access control systems, door-locking products, intrusion and fire alarm systems, and video surveillance products. The company also provides cellular communication services for intrusion and fire alarm systems, generating recurring monthly revenues. Products are sold to independent distributors, dealers, and installers for commercial, residential, institutional, industrial, and governmental applications. Net sales were $181.6 million for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025.

products.name: StarLink Cellular Communication Devices
products.description: Cellular communicators installed at end-user premises providing connectivity to central monitoring stations via the Networx Operations Center (NOC).

products.name: Networx Operations Center (NOC)
products.description: Cloud-based platform providing cellular communication services and hosted access control services to security devices.

products.name: LocDown Locks
products.description: Standalone lockdown locks operable by teachers for school security applications.

products.name: Networx Standalone Wireless Locks
products.description: Wireless locks communicating with central controls for networked school security deployments.

products.name: Access Control Systems
products.description: Systems with ID readers, control panels, PC-based computers, and electronically activated door-locking devices.

products.name: Intrusion Alarm Systems
products.description: Alarm systems including detectors, control panels, digital keypads, and signaling equipment for intrusion detection.

products.name: Fire Alarm Control Panels
products.description: Multi-zone fire alarm control panels with optional digital communicator for central station reporting.

products.name: Video Surveillance Systems
products.description: Systems including video cameras, control panels, and remote communication devices for monitoring and recording.

products.name: Door Locking Devices
products.description: Microprocessor-based electronic door locks with push button, card reader, and biometric operation; also mechanical locks and deadbolts.

products.name: Cellular Communication Services
products.description: Monthly recurring subscription services for secure cellular and cloud access for alarm communicators and smart security devices, ~91% gross margin.
